emails.subject: RE: Testing Request
emails.body: RE: Testing Request Stacey, I will be testing it. Do I need to run it with a specific desk's calc? Or any official calc will do? Thanks, Sam To: Chang, Fran; Dunton, Heather; Law, Samantha; Postlethwaite, John; Warner, Nicholas

emails.subject: RE: Testing Request
emails.body: Any calc will do. When testing, please do not write over AdHoc, I need to pull some information from there. Stacey

emails.subject: FW: Testing Request
emails.body: Stacey, This is the latest on the testing of HCS report of PortCalc. Would you still like me to follow up with Norman or somebody else? Thanks, Sam
